habilidad.name: Darkvision
habilidad.description: Tus ojos estan adaptados para mirar a 60f de distancia.

habilidad.name: Fey Ancestry
habilidad.description: Tienes resistencia a los estados de <Encantado> y  a <Sueño>.

habilidad.name: Entrenamiendo en armas Elficas
habilidad.description: Tienes proficiencia en armas de tipo <longsword>,<shortword>,<shortbow> and <longbow>.

habilidad.name: Dwarven Resilience
habilidad.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

habilidad.name: Dwarven Combat Training
habilidad.description: You have proficiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

habilidad.name: Tool Proficiency
habilidad.description: You gain proficiency with the artisan's tools of your choice: smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools.

habilidad.name: Stout Resilience
habilidad.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance to poison damage.

habilidad.name: Lucky
habilidad.description: When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die. You must use the new result, even if it is a 1.

habilidad.name: Brave
habilidad.description: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

habilidad.name: Nimble
habilidad.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

habilidad.name: Draconic Ancestry
habilidad.description: You are distantly related to a particular kind of dragon. Choose a type of dragon from the below list; this determines the damage and area of your breath weapon, and the type of resistance you gain.

habilidad.name: Breath Weapon
habilidad.description: You can use your action to exhale destructive energy. It deals damage in an area according to your ancestry.

habilidad.name: Damage Resistance
habilidad.description: You have resistance to the damage type associated with your ancestry.

habilidad.name: Hellish Resistance
habilidad.description: You have resistance to fire damage.
